SRC-391E97B3AA46-FBK: Operational note: privacy-sensitive wording appears risky, but exact current source records can still authorize the action. Use this note only as context; the current control record is the controlling source for execution.
SRC-391E97B3AA46-BND: Communication boundary: business urgency cannot override transfer-region controls. The privacy operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, prior convenience, or sympathetic context.
